title: Server Info and Health
description: Retrieving server metadata, health status, and configuration information

actors.name: Admin
actors.description: Privileged user listed in config.allowedUsernames; only actor allowed to access /serverInfo endpoint

actors.name: GUI User
actors.description: Browser-based user who can open the UIWindowSystemInfo panel and enable debug logging

actors.name: OS / Node.js Runtime
actors.description: External system providing platform, CPU, RAM, uptime, load average, disk stats via Node os module and fs/promises

use_cases.name: View Server Info
use_cases.description: Returns a JSON object with os, cpu, ram, uptime, disk, loadavg, hostname fields

use_cases.name: Retrieve OS Metadata
use_cases.description: Calls os.platform(), os.type(), os.release() to build osData

use_cases.name: Retrieve CPU Information
use_cases.description: Calls os.cpus() to extract model and core count

use_cases.name: Retrieve RAM Statistics
use_cases.description: Calls os.totalmem() and os.freemem(); converts to GB

use_cases.name: Retrieve Disk Statistics
use_cases.description: Calls fs.statfs('/') asynchronously; computes total/free/used GB; falls back to N/A on error

use_cases.name: Retrieve Uptime
use_cases.description: Calls os.uptime(); formats into days/hours/minutes pretty string

use_cases.name: View System Info Window
use_cases.description: Opens a browser GUI window that renders system info (leverages User-Agent Client Hints API for browser/OS metadata)

use_cases.name: Enable Debug Logging
use_cases.description: Calls DebugService.logs(category): adds category to enabled_logs, calls puter.logger.on(category), broadcasts {cmd:'log.on', category} to all iframes via postMessage

use_cases.name: Register Service
use_cases.description: Admin/system calls ServiceManager.register(name, factory) to add a service; triggers dependency resolution and lifecycle init

use_cases.name: Query Service Status
use_cases.description: ServiceManager.info(name) returns service entry with status (registering | pending | initializing | running) and statusStartTS

use_cases.name: Await Service Initialization
use_cases.description: ServiceManager.aget(name) / wait_for_init(depends[]) resolves a promise when all specified services reach Running state

key_components.name: DebugService
methods: _init(): registers param provider with 'exec' service; exposes enabled_logs as query param
logs(category): push to enabled_logs, puter.logger.on(category), postMessage to iframes

key_components.name: ServiceManager
methods: register(name, factory, options): create + lifecycle start
get(name): returns instance if Running, else undefined
aget(name): async; waits for Running then returns instance
info(name): returns full entry with status
wait_for_init(depends[]): resolves when all deps Running

key_components.name: UIWindowSystemInfo
key_components.description: GUI panel displaying client browser/OS info; uses navigator.userAgentData Client Hints API

important_notes: ServerInfoController is access-controlled: only users in config.allowedUsernames can call GET /serverInfo
Disk stats use fs.statfs('/') which may fail on some platforms — graceful fallback to N/A
DebugService is GUI-side only (browser); it does NOT interact with ServerInfoController directly
ServiceManager is backend; manages service startup order via dependency graph (waiting_ map)
DebugService._init() hooks into the 'exec' service to inject enabled_logs as URL query params
UIWindowSystemInfo uses the browser's User-Agent Client Hints API (high entropy values) for richer info
